title: tonningia glaberrima
intro: Tonningia glaberrima, also known as Tonningia, is a plant species in the family Apocynaceae, native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tonningia glaberrima include its ability to alleviate fever, reduce swelling, and soothe wounds, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Tonningia glaberrima is traditionally prepared as an infusion or decoction, often combined with other herbs, and may also be applied topically to the affected area.
